Hi I'm

Dibas mainali

Welcome to my portfolio website! I'm a Frontend developer, I bring expertise in creating dynamic and user-friendly web interfaces using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Proficient in modern frameworks like React and Vue.js, I focus on delivering responsive and visually appealing websites. With a strong foundation in UX/UI design principles and a commitment to staying current with industry trends, I aim to build web experiences that are both engaging and functional. Dedicated to collaborative teamwork and continuous learning, I strive to contribute to innovative and high-quality web solutions.

Download CV Contact

About Me

  • I am currently pursuing my Bachelor's Degree in BSC hons Computing. I have built a solid foundation in Frontend development, particularly in areas such as Backend as well as database.
  • My expertise in these areas allows me to approach projects with confidence and deliver high-quality results. I have a strong belief in the value of continuous learning and staying adaptable in the ever-evolving world of software developer.
  • I actively seek out opportunities to expand my knowledge and skills, embracing new technologies and approaches. Feel free to explore my work and get in touch if you have any questions or opportunities to collaborate.

Internship

Frontend Developer Intern

VritTech

August 2023

Contributed to web application UI development using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Worked with design and backend teams to implement responsive features and ensure cross-browser compatibility. Gained valuable experience in frontend development and user experience principles.

Software Developer Intern

Innovative Solutions

March 2024

Developed and maintained software applications using Python and Java. Conducted code reviews and unit testing to ensure high-quality deliverables. Gained hands-on experience in full-stack development and software engineering best practices.

My Projects

Discover my projects, where creativity meets innovation

Weather App

Created a weather application using React and API integration to fetch real-time weather data. Implemented responsive design and interactive user interface for an enhanced user experience.

Car Rental Booking System

Developed a comprehensive car rental booking system using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Python. Implemented features for selecting car models, dates, and locations with dynamic pricing calculations.

Nike.com

Developed a replica of the Nike.com website using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. The project includes features like a dynamic homepage, product listings, and a responsive design.
